description_long: This is a large, open hardcover book resting on a flat surface, with its pages spread wide to reveal both text and a detailed black-and-white illustration. The book's pages appear thick and slightly textured, with visible layering along the edges. The illustration on the right page depicts a group of people in a historical or classical setting, rendered in a realistic, engraved style. The book's cover is sturdy and plain, with a neutral, light-colored border visible around the edges. The binding is robust, and the book lies flat, suggesting it is well-made and possibly intended for display or reference. No visible title or decorative elements are present on the cover or spine.
description: A large, open hardcover book with thick, layered pages and a detailed black-and-white illustration on one page. The cover is plain and light-colored, with no visible title or decoration.
description_view_0: The book is open wide, showing both a page of text and a page with a detailed black-and-white illustration, with the left side slightly elevated.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the front, emphasizing the illustration and the layered edges of the pages, with the text page receding into the background.
description_view_2: The book is open with the right side slightly elevated, again showing both the illustration and text, but from the opposite angle of view 0.
description_view_3: The book is viewed from the back, showing the layered page edges and the flatness of the open book, with the illustration page partially visible.
